message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the south and should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the centre
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 4 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the hotel booking
The train should leave after 11:00 and should depart from leicester
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
